meta.title: Plaque formation with influenza viruses in dog kidney cells -- Ho et al. 33 (1): 143 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Infectious influenza and parainfluenza viruses were produced as plaql passages of egg-grown viruses in MDCK monolayers. Virus titres of 10(6) to 10(11) p.f.u./ml were obtained for several A and B strains of influenza and parainfluenza viruses.
